chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-800 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 3588/2020 For orders on M.A. 3589/2020 For hearing of main case 26.05.2022 Petitioner has filed this petition in his personal capacity with the prayer that he may be appointed as Assistant Professor (B-19) in the University of Sindh Jamshoro w.e.f. 2009 with all benefits and seniority etc. This petition is pending since 2020 and the petitioner never appeared once. It appears that after filing this petition he has lost interest in the proceedings. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE
